heading: Military park, Indian or other reservation
label: 942–7 Military park, Indian or other reservation
text: Sections 687a, 687a–2 to 687a–5, and 942–1 to 942–9 of this title and sections 607a and 615a of title 16 shall not apply to any lands within the limits of any military park, Indian, or other reservation unless such right of way shall be provided for by Act of Congress.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 687a and 687a–2 to 687a–5 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , §§ 703(a), 704(a), , , 2792.Pub. L. 94–579, title VII90 Stat. 2789Oct. 21, 1976
